findings.cross_chain_exit_mechanism: USDT sent to Rhino.fi bridge via batched relayer deposits; cross-chain routing encoded in commitmentId / off-chain Rhino quote (API auth required for exact chainOut)

verdict: Top-3 funds exit BSC through Rhino.fi bridge using batched deposit transactions. On-chain deposit events link sender contracts to commitmentIds; destination chain resolution requires Rhino bridge status API or destination-chain withdraw tx lookup.
